---
title: "Troubleshooting"
format: html
---

### Troubleshooting

This page captures known issues and resolutions encountered during deployment and
configuration. It is updated as issues are discovered and resolved.

<!-- Add issues as encountered using the structure below:

---

#### <Short description of the issue>

**Symptom**
What the error or failure looked like (error message, log output, or UI state).

**Root cause**
Why it happened.

**Resolution**
What fixed it. Exact commands or config changes where applicable.

**Notes**
Any caveats, conditions, or related issues.

-->
